title: 'Winner beyond medals': Bollywood roots for Vinesh Phogat after her disqualification from Olympics
description: After Vinesh Phogat's heartbreaking disqualification from Paris Olympics 2024 for being overweight reportedly by 100 grams, Bollywood stars including Vicky Kaushal, Farhan Akhtra and Samantha Ruth Prabhu among others are rooting for her.
